sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79295" key="parekri/ptw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρεκ-ρίπτω</orth>, <sense id="n79295.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throw up</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἰς τοὺς αἰγιαλούς</foreign>, of the sea, prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
